name: canvas-study-buddy
description: Personal study assistant for Canvas LMS
long_description: Canvas Study Buddy is your personal study assistant. Get deadlines, grades, feedback and announcements across all your courses. Smart workflows like morning briefings, health checks and catch-up plans. Built as an MCP server for Claude Desktop.

api_token.title: Canvas API Token
api_token.description: Your Canvas API token. Generate at Canvas > Account > Settings > New Access Token

tools.name: get-all-courses
tools.description: Get all courses including completed ones

tools.name: get-course-overview
tools.description: Full course overview in one call

tools.name: get-course-files
tools.description: Get course files, filterable by type

tools.name: get-my-grades
tools.description: Grades per course with individual scores

tools.name: search-all-content
tools.description: Search across pages, modules, assignments, files

tools.name: get-module-content
tools.description: Full module content including page bodies

prompts.name: morning-briefing
prompts.text: Give my morning briefing: new announcements, today's deadlines, unread feedback. Use get-unread-announcements, get-upcoming-deadlines (days=2), and get-unread-feedback.

prompts.name: get-todo
prompts.text: Create my full todo list sorted by urgency. Use get-upcoming-deadlines (days=30) and get-missed-deadlines.

prompts.name: week-overview
prompts.text: Give a week overview. Use get-upcoming-deadlines (days=7), get-all-announcements (days=7), and get-recent-updates (days=7).

prompts.name: vak-deep-dive
prompts.text: Give a full overview of the course "{vaknaam}". Use get-all-courses to find the ID, then get-course-overview, get-course-syllabus, get-submission-status, get-my-grades, and get-course-announcements.

prompts.name: assignment-briefing
prompts.text: Give a full briefing for assignment "{opdrachtnaam}". Use search-all-content to find it, then get-assignment-details, get-assignment-rubric, and get-assignment-feedback.

prompts.name: check-feedback
prompts.text: Analyze all my recent feedback. Use get-all-feedback (days=60) and get-unread-feedback. Identify patterns, strengths, and improvement areas.

prompts.name: study-gap-analysis
prompts.text: Do a study gap analysis. Use get-all-courses, get-study-progress per course, and get-missed-deadlines. Show what modules and assignments I've missed.

prompts.name: monday-morning
prompts.text: Monday morning briefing. Use get-upcoming-deadlines (days=7), get-unread-announcements, get-unread-feedback, and get-missed-deadlines. Create a day-by-day plan.

prompts.name: deadline-pressure
prompts.text: Analyze my deadline pressure. Use get-upcoming-deadlines (days=14) and get-study-progress. Show how to distribute time.

prompts.name: end-of-week
prompts.text: End of week wrap-up. Use get-study-progress, get-upcoming-deadlines (days=7), get-missed-deadlines, and get-all-feedback (days=7). Show what's done, open, and urgent for next week.

prompts.name: health-check
prompts.text: Study health check. Use get-all-courses, get-study-progress per course, get-my-grades, get-missed-deadlines, and get-unread-feedback. Flag courses where I'm falling behind.

prompts.name: catch-up-plan
prompts.text: Make a catch-up plan for "{vak}". Use get-all-courses, get-submission-status, get-missed-deadlines, and get-upcoming-deadlines (days=30). Create a prioritized day-by-day plan.
